title: Inline Edit
overview: After running a query, double-click a cell to edit it inline—including picklist and reference fields. If multiple rows are selected, the change can be applied to all selected records in one action, then saved.
generalUseCase: Use Inline Edit to quickly update query results right in the grid—including picklist and reference fields—and apply the same change to multiple selected records for fast, in-place bulk edits.
